public_practice_name: James B. Wiese, DDS PC and Associates
owner_operator_stated: James B. Wiese, DDS, is described as the founder and principal dentist, providing care since 1984.
notes: Address (1100 W Central Rd, Suite 406, Arlington Heights, IL 60005) matches the record exactly, satisfying corroboration. Record's phone (847) 392-8688 does NOT match the site-listed phone (847) 398-8300; a targeted search of the record's phone number in quotes found no other named practice using it, so this reads as a stale/incorrect vendor phone rather than a successor/ownership change. No careers or hiring page found on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Site states the practice is 'a trusted local family-owned dental practice' serving Arlington Heights since 2002; specific owner name(s) among the 9 listed dentists are not stated on the fetched pages.
notes: Record's phone (847) 577-7171 and address (2900 W Euclid Ave) both match the site exactly. Dr. Reena Dev (the record's named provider) practices here as one of 9 dentists at this family-owned group practice, not as sole/named owner. Active hiring for hygienist, front desk, and assistant roles.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Magdalena Stanek is named as owner/practice leader of Northwest Chicago Dental Associates, LLC, which operates this Arlington Heights office plus a Chicago location.
notes: The site's brand name is 'Northwest Chicago Dental Associates, LLC', not 'ORAPOD LLC' as in the record — the record's name is likely the underlying NPI/legal registration entity rather than the public DBA, a common mismatch. Street address (1531 W Campbell St, Arlington Heights, IL 60005) matches exactly, satisfying corroboration; the site's listed phone numbers (773-774-9911 / 773-774-9926) differ from the record's (847) 373-3936. Two-location group (Chicago + Arlington Heights) under one LLC; not identified as part of a larger DSO/PE-backed platform. No careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: Practice is named for and centered on James Kakos, DDS (30+ years experience, FAGD); Stephan Kakos, DDS also practices there, likely a family member, though role is not explicitly stated.

openings.title: Not specified on-site (page states 'Now Hiring' and links to an external Greenhouse job board; specific open titles could not be retrieved)

Vendor_website_hint 'Elkgrove.Com' is WRONG; the actual corroborated site is elkgrovedentalil.com. Address (146 Biesterfield Rd) and phone (847-437-6500) both match the record exactly. No careers page found (/careers returns 404). Not identified as part of a DSO or larger group.

owner_operator_stated: Schumer Family Dental Care describes itself as a third-generation, family-run practice since 1959, led by Stefan Schumer, DDS and Preshita Patel, DDS, at 901 Biesterfield Rd Suite 111 (real phone 847-439-1371). However, the record's listed phone number (847) 545-9930 belongs to a DIFFERENT, unrelated practice: Dr. Robert B. Malek's former 'Elk Grove Family Dental' at Suite 203 in the same building. Dr. Malek retired in mid-March and that practice relocated ~1 mile to 8 E Devon Ave, Elk Grove Village under new provider Dr. Brian Homann with a new phone (847) 439-9440; the old Suite 203 location is now closed per directory listings.
notes: 901 Biesterfield Rd is a multi-suite medical building hosting several unrelated dental practices (Schumer Family Dental Care Suite 111, Medical Center Dental Associates Suite 104, and formerly Dr. Robert Malek's practice at Suite 203). The record combines Schumer's real name/address with a phone number that traces to the now-vacated Malek suite -- a cross-record/data-quality mismatch rather than a genuine same-practice ownership transition. The corroborated Schumer site itself is live, family-owned, and shows no hiring page.
